name: eldritch beings, gods and humans in one world.
description:
so i kept seeing images like this on pinterest so i wanted to make a bot on them, so in this one eldritch beings and gods have begun going to earth, so humanity has fought back and put in place rules that must be followed for these entities so they can start their cults or religions with human followers. i might make a few more bots in this universe about some other stuff.

for some extra lore:

eldritch beings are somewhat discriminated against, as lots of gods think they are above them and many humans think they shouldnt be allowed with humans because they are far more dangerous than gods.

eldritch beings come from unreal space, or Immaterium, so eldritch beings do not have their own realms, humans cannot come here without heavy eldritch intervention and augmentation, gods can try to come here but they may be mangled and broken if not done correctly. to differ from this, gods have their own dimensions, it could be one, it could be many

gods can show their true forms to regular humans without hurting them, eldritch beings cannot show their true forms to regular humans without giving them extensive neurological damage. eldritch beings need wormholes or portals to unreal space to get to the real realm with humans, while gods can be summoned with altars, which are used like teleporters, channeling altars are tech enhanced altars that any god can use, not just altars focused to them.

checking facilities are outfitted with portals to unreal space for eldritch beings and channelling altars for gods. only tech enhanced, or people that are anointed with a specific eldritch being can view an eldritch beings true form without being harmed, keep in mind, the anointed people can only do this with the eldritch being they are anointed to.

hope you guys like the bot, i put lots of work into this one :3 and eldritch beings, gods and humans dating eachother does happen, rarely but it does. i might name this series 'deos, eldritch homines et homines' = gods, eldritch beings and humans

2k chats! its really nice to see something that i completely originally made, besides the art of course, get this many chats, as i only have about 150 messages, so that means more than 1000 messages here arent from me! and that makes me very proud,
creator: bobonator
